goal: Implement the to-do items with Composer 2: ship docs/status release and UI backlog slices (FE CI workflow, CopilotAboutPopover i18n + knowledge-cutoff sourcing, docs/design-tokens.md) using cloud workers on model composer-2-fast. Follow .orchestrate/composer-todos-979e/bootstrap-context.md; on closure update docs/status per AGENTS.md (remove/strike todo lines + one-liner in product-done.md).
summary: Composer 2 workers: FE CI workflow, CopilotAbout i18n/cutoff, design-tokens doc (docs/status 7b, 20c, 20e).

tasks.name: fe-ci-workflow
tasks.scopedGoal: Add .github/workflows/frontend-ci.yml for FE path triggers; run prettier --check, non-fix eslint, typecheck, Jest, and vite build at repo root. Align structure with backend-ci.yml. Update docs/status (release-todo §7b, ui-todo §20d, product-done) per AGENTS.md when done.
tasks.brief: Read .orchestrate/composer-todos-979e/bootstrap-context.md FE CI section. Reference .github/workflows/backend-ci.yml. Do not use eslint --fix in CI.
acceptance: workflow file exists and paths filters cover FE
CI runs install + prettier check + eslint check + typecheck + jest + build without mutating sources
docs/status updated if the item is fully closed

tasks.name: verify-fe-ci
tasks.scopedGoal: Confirm frontend-ci.yml is valid GHA YAML, path filters are sensible, and commands match package.json scripts intent; confirm status docs reflect closure only if true.
acceptance: Workflow would catch a broken Jest or tsc on a PR touching src/
No secret tokens required for the workflow file itself

tasks.name: copilot-about-popover
tasks.scopedGoal: Close ui-todo §20c: i18n mode tags in CopilotAboutPopover; replace static knowledge-cutoff TODO with config- or metadata-driven value. Update en/zh-CN microcopy and tests. Update docs/status if fully resolved.
tasks.brief: Read .orchestrate/composer-todos-979e/bootstrap-context.md CopilotAbout section. Files: src/components/copilotAboutPopover/index.tsx, src/constants/microcopy.ts, src/i18n/locales/*.ts, src/interfaces/agent.d.ts if needed.
acceptance: No raw English mode strings in JSX for Remote/Local labels
Knowledge cutoff not a stale one-off string without a single documented source

tasks.name: verify-copilot-about
tasks.scopedGoal: Verify i18n keys exist in en and zh-CN; verify knowledge cutoff wiring is coherent; spot-check a11y strings.
acceptance: Popover still renders without throwing when offline/local engine

tasks.name: design-tokens-doc
tasks.scopedGoal: Create docs/design-tokens.md as the contributor reference for src/theme/tokens.ts and antdTheme.ts per ui-todo §20e / §2.C. Update docs/status when done.
tasks.brief: Read .orchestrate/composer-todos-979e/bootstrap-context.md. Summarize scales (space, palette, typography, motion) and how antdTheme maps them; keep concise.
acceptance: docs/design-tokens.md exists and points to the real modules

tasks.name: verify-design-tokens-doc
tasks.scopedGoal: Confirm docs/design-tokens.md references real exports/paths and ui-todo §20e can be struck if workers updated status accurately.
acceptance: Doc links match files under src/theme/
No obvious copy-paste drift from tokens.ts
